column16:
Prestige Janitorial & Sanitation Services (PJSS) offers a full range of cleaning services to suit any 
business and almost any budget; from light office cleaning to deep facility cleaning. Our highly trained staff will ensure your surrounding is pleasant, safe, healthy, and environmentally friendly. For your peace of mind, we carry comprehensive general liability and property damage insurance, and all our staff members are covered by workers' Compensation.

With over two decades of experience as a Public Health and Food Safety Inspector, our 
Team Lead brings a unique perspective and knowledge to cleaning and maintaining of the premises.  

PJSS specializes in the cleaning of commercial and residential premises. Our services alao include emptying trash receptacles, exchanging
compactor bins, clearing blocked chutes, post-construction cleaning, glass and partition
cleaning, dusting furniture and other surfaces. We also specialize in cleaning and vacuuming carpets, floors, stairwells, upholstery, among many other duties.

The Team: Our professional cleaning team is dedicated to ensuring your facility gleams. Each team member will be attired in a black uniform featuring our company logo, a name tag, and appropriate footwear. Our staff is characterized by their compassionate, courteous, amiable, honest, respectful, and excellence-driven approach. Furthermore, our team members are positive, reliable, and extensively trained in the correct handling of cleaning chemicals, sanitation protocols, and hygiene practices. We assure you that every detail will be meticulously addressed.

Our Cleaning Philosophy: We assert that a pristine working and living environment is integral to well-being. Our systematic methodology for achieving and sustaining the utmost standards of cleanliness allows you to concentrate on your core business and client relations. We prioritize quality control. Since our inception, we have refined a robust system of weekly, monthly, and annual janitorial maintenance, ensuring optimal outcomes.

Approved Cleaning Chemical: We know that the health and safety of your tenants and employees is critical to you. We also know that the care, management, and protection of the physical and natural environment are your main priority, as well as ours. As such, the chemicals we use for cleaning and sanitizing are approved by Health Canada, environmentally friendly, recommended for food and residential facilities, and some are scent-free. It is essential that all sanitizers, cleaning products, and devices used to control microorganism growth be registered and listed under the Pest Control Products Act to prevent the use of unsafe chemicals.  Our chemical list is available upon request.

column16:
Our Mission at Nova Cleaning

At Nova Cleaning, our mission is simple: to bring clarity, comfort, and peace of mind into every space we touch. We believe a clean environment has the power to transform how people live and work, and we are committed to delivering excellence with every visit. Guided by the principle found in Proverbs 3:5–7, we trust in the Lord in all that we do and allow integrity, honesty, and care to lead our service.

Who We Are

Nova Cleaning is a locally owned and faith-driven cleaning company proudly serving Houston and the surrounding areas. We were founded on the belief that exceptional cleaning is more than a service — it’s a ministry of service, stewardship, and love for community. Every home and business we enter is treated with respect, confidentiality, and the same attention we would give our own.

Our Commitment

Delivering dependable, high-quality cleanings

Creating healthier, fresher spaces for families and businesses

Building long-term relationships based on trust

Providing service with integrity, compassion, and excellence

Why We Do It

We understand that life gets busy. Our goal is to remove the stress from your day by ensuring your environment is clean, organized, and welcoming. Whether it’s a family home, an office, or a post-construction project, we approach every job with gratitude and purpose.

At Nova Cleaning, we don’t just clean —
we serve, we care, and we shine so our clients can too.

column16:
Our work consist of understanding our clients emotions to enable the tools of transforming spaces where the objective is to enjoy different sensations and experiences!!
The services that I provide start from the visits to each project, the taking of measurements, the presentation of design proposals through renderings, advice and support in the choice of materials, furniture, accessories, etc. in person and virtually.
We love to be part of the experience in each project in which each of our clients makes their wishes and expectations come true!!

Nuestro trabajo consiste en comprender las emociones de nuestros clientes, interpretar su vision y llevarla a la realidad. 
Transformar los  espacios de la manera mas estetica y funcional posible !!
Los servicios que brindo empiezan desde las visitas a cada proyecto, la toma de medidas, la presentación de propuestas del diseno por medio de renders, la asesoría y acompañamiento  en la elección de materiales, muebles, accesorios etc de manera presencial y virtual.
Nos encanta ser parte de la experiencia vivida en cada proyecto donde nuestros clientes hacen realidad sus sueños y expectativas.
column22:
Mi experiencia empezó en Colombia hace 18 años.
He tenido la oportunidad de trabajar en numerosos proyectos que me han permitido desarrollar habilidades para planificar y ejecutar  espacios no solo visualmente atractivos sino también funcionales y prácticos. 
Mi inspiración viene de los viajes por todo el mundo en busqueda de piezas únicas de libros y fotos que ilustran las expresiones del hombre a través de materiales, formas y simbolos  y de la pasión que me mueve constantemente a aprender del maravilloso mundo del arte.

 My experience began in Colombia 18 years ago.
I have had the opportunity to work on numerous projects that have allowed me to develop skills to plan and execute spaces that are not only visually appealing but also functional and practical.
My inspiration comes from traveling around the world in search of unique pieces of books and photos that illustrate the expressions of man through materials, shapes and symbols and from the passion that constantly moves me to learn from the wonderful world of art.
column23:
EVERY PROJECT, BIG OR SMALL THAT COMES INTO MY HANDS I RECEIVE IT WITH A LOT OF LOVE, I DEVELOP IT WITH PASSION AND DEDICATION. I TAKE THE TIME TO LISTEN CAREFULLY TO MY CLIENTS TO CREATE SPACES THAT PERFECTLY FIT THEIR TASTES AND REQUIREMENTS.
MY BIGGEST GOAL IS TO MAKE SURE MY CLIENTS ARE COMPLETELY SATISFIED WITH THE END RESULT, I WILL WORK HARD TO EXCEED YOUR EXPECTATIONS, PROVIDING YOU WITH A PROFESSIONAL SERVICE AND CREATING A SPACE THAT YOU REALLY LOVE AND ENJOY!!


CADA PROYECTO, GRANDE O PEQUENO QUE LLEGA A MIS MANOS LO RECIBO  CON MUCHO AMOR, LO DESARROLLO CON PASION Y DEDICACION. ME TOMO EL TIEMPO PARA ESCUCHAR ATENTAMENTE A MIS CLIENTES PARA CREAR ESPACIOS QUE SE AJUSTEN PERFECTAMENTE A SUS GUSTOS Y REQUISITOS.
 MI MAYOR OBJETIVO ES ASEGURARME QUE MIS CLIENTES ESTEN COMPLETAMENTE SATISFECHOS CON EL RESULTADO FINAL, TRABAJARE ARDUAMENTE PARA SUPERAR TUS EXPECTATIVAS, BRINDANDOTE UN SERVICIO PROFESIONAL Y CREANDO UN ESPACIO QUE REALMENTE AMES Y DISFRUTES!!
